# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: http-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: example-service-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "example.com"
  gateways:
  - istio-system/http-gateway
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/api"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api-service
        port:
          number: 8080
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/web"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: web-service
        port:
          number: 3000
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: default-service
        port:
          number: 8000
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: app-service-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "app.example.com"
  gateways:
  - istio-system/http-gateway
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: app-service
        port:
          number: 9090
